FLEX_LIMITS_SUBTITLE: Enter a target monthly maximum and we'll set usage limits to match, or fine-tune each limit yourself.
FLEX_LIMITS_TARGET_NOTE: This is not a hard cap, manual actions like adding sites or admin seats can exceed this limit. Check upcoming invoices in Billing Analytics at any time.
FLEX_LIMITS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Leave a field empty to keep that usage unlimited.
FLEX_LIMITS_MINIMUM_NOTE: The Flex minimum charge of [amount]/mo still applies.
FLEX_LIMITS_SAVE_FAILED: We hit a snag saving your limits. Try again in a moment.
